title: 购物商业：售后沟通
method: 学习 -> 测验 -> 跟读 -> 通过后进入下一句
sources: Manual curation based on common ecommerce and customer-service exchanges.

units.phrase: I would like to return this item.
units.exampleEn: I would like to return this item. It does not fit as expected.
units.exampleZh: 我想退掉这个商品。它不像预期那样合适。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 I want back this thing。return this item 是标准售后说法。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合线下门店、电商客服、售后邮件开头。

quiz.sampleAnswer: I would like to return this item.

units.phrase: When will the refund be processed?
units.exampleEn: When will the refund be processed? I returned the item yesterday.
units.exampleZh: 退款什么时候处理？我昨天已经退回商品了。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 when give money back。refund be processed 更正式。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合退货后追问退款时间。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问退款什么时候处理。
quiz.sampleAnswer: When will the refund be processed?

units.exampleEn: The item arrived damaged. I can send photos as proof.
units.exampleZh: 商品到货时已经损坏。我可以发照片作为证明。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要只说 product bad。arrived damaged 能明确说明是到货损坏。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合售后沟通里描述损坏、缺件、破损。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说明商品到货损坏。

units.meaningZh: 你们可以补发/换一个吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you send a replacement? The original one does not work.
units.exampleZh: 你们可以补发一个吗？原来的不能用。
units.commonMistakeZh: replacement 表示替换品/补发品，不要说 send another same thing。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合坏件、错发、缺件时要求换货或补发。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文礼貌要求补发一个。

units.phrase: Could you explain your return policy?
units.meaningZh: 你能解释一下你们的退货政策吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you explain your return policy? I want to know the deadline and conditions.
units.exampleZh: 你能解释一下你们的退货政策吗？我想知道期限和条件。
units.commonMistakeZh: policy 是政策/规则，不要说 return rule 太口语化。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合购买前或售后前确认规则。

quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you explain your return policy?

units.phrase: I have attached photos of the issue.
units.exampleEn: I have attached photos of the issue. Please let me know what else you need.
units.exampleZh: 我已经附上问题照片。请告诉我你还需要什么。
units.commonMistakeZh: 邮件里说 attached photos 比 send pictures 更正式。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合邮件/客服工单里上传图片、视频、订单截图。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说明你已经附上问题照片。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I have attached photos of the issue.

units.phrase: Could you check my order status?
units.meaningZh: 你能帮我查一下订单状态吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you check my order status? The tracking has not updated for three days.
units.exampleZh: 你能帮我查一下订单状态吗？物流三天没更新了。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 see my order now。check my order status 更自然。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合追踪物流、确认订单是否发货。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文请客服查看订单状态。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you check my order status?

units.meaningZh: 你们能提供什么解决方案？
units.exampleEn: What solution can you offer? I would prefer a replacement instead of a refund.
units.exampleZh: 你们能提供什么解决方案？比起退款，我更希望换货。
units.commonMistakeZh: solution can you offer 是礼貌但明确的问法，不要说 how you solve。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合对方还没给出处理方式时推动下一步。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文询问对方能提供什么解决方案。
